sentences.text: Please wait and a staff member will be with you shortly. This call may be monitored or recorded for quality assurance. Thank you for calling the Meridian North and South and I unmanaged community for the Meridian North, press one For the Meridien South, Press two.

You have reached the Meridien South. If you know your party's extension, you may dial it at any time. For leasing, press one. For residents services, press two. For rental account. Thank you for calling. Please wait and a staff member will be with you shortly. Thank you for calling. If you are looking for information on renting or leasing an apartment, please press one. If you are a resident and have a maintenance need in your apartment, please press two. If you are a resident with a non maintenance related question, please press three.
